problem id: 840050ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR NOT SHL(7)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  10010110 -> 00001001
  11000111 -> 00001100
  01001101 -> 10000100
  00001011 -> 10000000
  01101010 -> 00000110
  10010111 -> 00001001
  00011101 -> 10000001
  11101010 -> 00001110
  11001111 -> 10001100

query: 10101101
predicted answer: 10001010
